game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Lux DLX 3:** Lux DLX 3 is a turn-based strategy game where players aim for world domination by conquering territories on various maps, deploying armies, and engaging in combat against AI opponents or other players on a single device. Each turn, players receive reinforcements based on their controlled territories and continents, which they deploy by tapping on their owned regions, then initiate attacks by tapping an attacking territory and a target adjacent enemy territory. Combat outcomes are determined by dice rolls, with the attacker needing at least 3 armies to attack, and players earn territory cards for conquering at least one enemy country per turn, which can be traded for additional reinforcements. The game concludes when one player controls all territories on the map, with difficulty scaling through different AI personalities and a vast selection of over 100 unique maps and scenarios.
game_info.description: Lux DLX 3 is a turn-based strategy game where you compete against an AI opponent to conquer all territories on the map. Each turn, receive reinforcements based on your controlled territories, deploy armies to your regions, and attack adjacent enemy territories. Combat is resolved through dice rolls - you need at least 3 armies to attack. Conquer at least one territory per turn to earn bonus cards that can be traded for extra reinforcements. Victory is achieved by controlling all territories on the map.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/select territories during deployment and attack phases
Space: Confirm selection (deploy armies, initiate attack, trade cards)
Z: End current phase (deployment/attack/fortification)
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and selection testing. This test validates that the player can navigate through territories, select them, and transition between game phases correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through all territories using arrow keys, attempt to select both owned and enemy territories, and cycle through all game phases (reinforcement, deployment, attack, fortification).
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test should successfully navigate all territories, correctly identify owned vs enemy territories, and smoothly transition between all turn phases without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete victory testing. This test implements an optimal strategy to win the game by conquering all territories from the AI opponent.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Deploy all reinforcements to border territories, systematically attack adjacent enemy territories with overwhelming force, focus on eliminating the AI player completely, and collect card bonuses to accelerate conquest.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by conquering all territories on the map, demonstrating that the win condition is properly implemented and achievable.
